summary: A cinematic, music-driven inauguration-day montage posted by POTUS celebrating the start of Trump's term as the 'golden age of America.' Fast-cut, color-graded footage of Marine One on the White House lawn at golden hour, a prayer scene under 'IN GOD WE TRUST,' a packed military hangar rally, and Trump saluting a helicopter flyover, ending on a stylized 'THE WHITE HOUSE / PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP' title card. The empty transcript, high music score, and movie-trailer-style title treatment make this an aspirational spectacle built for emotional/patriotic appeal rather than information, so it fits youth-appeal produced content.

script.scene: Head-on hero shot of Marine One (green-and-white VH-3) parked on the White House South Lawn at golden hour, boarding stairs extended; cinematic backlit composition. No talking (music-driven).
Dim, reverent interior scene of a prayer/blessing with Trump bowed before a US flag, gold lettering 'IN GOD WE TRUST' carved on the wall; attendees with hands raised.
Wide shot of a massive crowd of service members filling a military aircraft hangar, giant American flag and fighter jets framing the stage for a rally.
Low-angle shot of Trump applauding as Army helicopters (Chinooks, Black Hawks, Apaches) fly over against a blue sky next to a waving American flag.
Closing title card: stylized dark engraving of the White House facade with a waving flag, centered serif text 'THE WHITE HOUSE / PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP.'

notable_text: On-screen end card: 'THE WHITE HOUSE / PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP'; in-frame engraving 'IN GOD WE TRUST'. Tweet: 'AMERICA IS BACK.' / 'This will truly be the golden age of America.'
